title: amaranthus minimus
intro: Amaranthus minimus, also known as dwarf amaranth, is a small annual plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Amaranthus minimus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
